<Badge text="anthropics-skills-all" variant="note" /> <Badge text="16 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Avoid default" variant="danger" /> <Badge text="global-only-or-avoid" variant="default" />

> inspect case-by-case; many skills duplicate local/system skills.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add anthropics/skills --skill anthropics-skills-all -y -g
```

**Use:** `/anthropics-skills-all`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/anthropics-skills-all.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets all supported agent harnesses via the install command below.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add anthropics/skills --skill anthropics-skills-all -y -g
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Avoid default** (`global-only-or-avoid`)

Curated status: `global-only-or-avoid`

Risk notes: inspect case-by-case; many skills duplicate local/system skills.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Official Anthropic skills repository demonstrating the Agent Skills system for Claude. Contains example skills across creative/design, development/technical, enterprise/comms, plus production document creation/editing capabilities (docx, pdf, pptx, xlsx) and the skills spec/template. The `anthropics-skills-all` entry represents the full/wildcard source (many individual skills available). Skills are self-contained SKILL.md + resources for repeatable task performance; some open (Apache 2.0), document skills source-available as reference.

## Install Prerequisites

No direct curated install command for the -all wildcard in this status section (see config/external-skills.md for explicit avoid note). General install via Claude Code plugin marketplace (anthropic-agent-skills), document-skills or example-skills sub-plugins, or skills.sh. Selector would be wildcard or broad. Status explicitly global-only-or-avoid.

## Upstream Maintainer

Anthropic (github.com/anthropics/skills; anthropic.com). Official. Includes partner examples (e.g. Notion). Links to full skills docs and engineering post on Agent Skills. 151k stars, active.

## Comparable Alternatives

Local or repo-owned skills for document handling, creative tasks, or specific workflows; narrower curated skills from other sources; direct use of Claude native document features or MCP where applicable instead of broad third-party skill bundles; custom skills built from the included template/spec.

&gt; Web-augmented research; evidence only, not authority. Config in external-skills.md is authoritative for install.
